programme.title: Rang De
programme.desc: This is the story of Dua, a lively and strong young girl who lives with her mother, Nudrat, and her grandmother, Noor Bahar.

programme.desc: This is the story of Dua, a lively and strong young girl who lives with her mother, Nudrat, and her grandmother, Noor Bahar.

programme.title: Khush Naseebi
programme.desc: Khush Naseebi is a heartfelt story of Siraj Qasmi and his three daughters, Narmeen, Maheen, and Emaan.

programme.title: Aik Aur Pakeezah
programme.desc: Aik Aur Pakeezah tells the story of Pakeezah, a young woman whose life takes a tragic turn.

programme.title: Quran Sub Kay Liye
programme.desc: A renowned scholar, Dr. Farhat Hashmi, bringing for you an exclusive program based on the easy translation for everyone to understand.

programme.title: Hasna Mana Hai
programme.desc: Comedian Tabish Hashmi interacts with celebrity guests about their latest films while keeping the audience laughing with his wit, humour and assorted skits.

programme.title: Ahram e Junoon
programme.desc: Shanzay believes that money can buy everything, including happiness. Will Shayan break through her walls of pride and stubbornness or will she chase after superficial things?

programme.title: Sara Aapi
programme.desc: Sara Aapi is the story of a woman who sacrificed her dreams and the most precious years of her youth to give her three brothers the best upbringing.

programme.desc: Pehli Barish is a story of love that spans generations, a tale of joy, longing, and heartbreak that seems to repeat itself.

programme.desc: Comedian Tabish Hashmi interacts with celebrity guests about their latest films while keeping the audience laughing with his wit, humour and assorted skits.

programme.title: Dayyan
programme.desc: Dayyan is a gripping story of a girl fighting for justice after enduring a series of injustices. It follows Nihaal, a young woman whose life is shattered by a tragic turn of events.

programme.title: Sara Aapi
programme.desc: Sara Aapi is the story of a woman who sacrificed her dreams and the most precious years of her youth to give her three brothers the best upbringing.

programme.title: Rang De
programme.desc: This is the story of Dua, a lively and strong young girl who lives with her mother, Nudrat, and her grandmother, Noor Bahar.

programme.title: Khush Naseebi
programme.desc: Khush Naseebi is a heartfelt story of Siraj Qasmi and his three daughters, Narmeen, Maheen, and Emaan.

programme.title: Humrahi
programme.desc: What begins as a series of light-hearted yet unpleasant encounters between Sayhaan and Elif eventually blossoms into an unexpected and deep-rooted love.

programme.title: Quran Sub Kay Liye
programme.desc: A renowned scholar, Dr. Farhat Hashmi, bringing for you an exclusive program based on the easy translation for everyone to understand.
